Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $85 in July?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Near coin-flip odds (58% YES) crude reach $85. Closes in 14d. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $95 in July?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (13% odds) on crude reach $95. Closes in 14d. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $65 in July?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (6% odds) on crude drop below $65. Closes in 14d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $60 in July?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (1% odds) on crude drop below $60. Closes in 14d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Economy & Markets.title: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the July 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 96% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25 bps after the July 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 4% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will no Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: 84% odds of a rate cut. Lower rates reduce operating loan and land interest carrying cost -- historically supportive of commodity prices via weaker dollar.

Economy & Markets.title: Will 3 Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: 1% odds of a rate cut. Lower rates reduce operating loan and land interest carrying cost -- historically supportive of commodity prices via weaker dollar.
